channel.title: Penobscot County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: penobscotdeeds.com's robots.txt disallows all automated fetching ('Disallow: /'), so this source is intentionally left unfetched out of respect for that policy and will always show as failing/blocked on the status dashboard. The county government site (penobscot-county.net) does not host its own registry page and only links out to penobscotdeeds.com, so no compliant alternative URL is currently available. Kept enabled (rather than removed) for transparency; revisit if the registry publishes an alternate page.
